description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa upholstered in a red and black plaid fabric, giving it a cozy and rustic appearance. The sofa features a boxy silhouette with straight, padded armrests that are the same height as the backrest, creating a uniform and enclosed seating area. The seat and back cushions are divided into two sections each, with the cushions appearing to be attached and matching the upholstery pattern. The legs are short, cylindrical, and made of dark wood, positioned at each corner for stability. The overall design is simple yet inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings. The plaid pattern and sturdy construction suggest a blend of comfort and durability.
description: A two-seater sofa with red and black plaid upholstery, straight padded armrests, and dark wooden legs. The design is boxy, cozy, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing two individual seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full plaid pattern.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, padded armrest and the depth of the seat, with the plaid pattern visible on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the plaid fabric wrapping around the back, with both rear legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest and seat depth from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two individual seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, forming a symmetrical arrangement.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, boxy profile with no decorative elements, fully upholstered in plaid fabric.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical legs made of dark wood, positioned at each corner, exposed and simple in style.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two attached back cushions, continuous and uniform in shape, matching the seat cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Red and black plaid pattern, evenly distributed across all visible surfaces, with a soft, matte fabric texture.
